Home.heading: How are you feeling today?
Home.label: TELL US IN YOUR OWN WORDS
Home.privacy: No sign-up needed. Your conversation is saved and may be reviewed to improve Theraper, and is processed by AI — kept confidential and never sold.
Home.tagline: Find the right therapist, and meet them on-platform.

Intake.aiKeyNotice: AI mode needs an API key — showing the guided flow for now.
Intake.greeting: Hi — I'm really glad you're here. Taking this step isn't easy, so thank you for showing up for yourself.
Intake.concernQ: Thank you for trusting me with that. Which of these feels closest to what you're carrying?
Intake.styleQ: That makes sense. What kind of support feels right for you?
Intake.languageQ: And which language would you feel most comfortable in?
Intake.somethingElse: Of course — tell me in your own words what's been going on.
Intake.respect: You've been carrying a lot on your own — that takes real strength.
Intake.support: Whatever the answer, we'll find someone who can walk through this with you.
Intake.noMatch: I don't yet have someone who's a clear fit for what you described — would you like to browse our therapists, or have someone reach out?
Intake.fitGateQ: Before I match you, can I ask a few quick questions to get the fit right?
Intake.fitGenderQ: What gender therapist would you feel most comfortable with?
Intake.fitReligionQ: What religious background would you like your therapist to have? (so I can find someone who understands your world)
Intake.fitAvailabilityQ: When would you usually want to meet?
Intake.fitFeeQ: And what works best for you around fees?
Intake.followupConfirm: Thank you — someone from our team will reach out to you soon.
Intake.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
